purpose: Automate the former manual loop: reveal, diagnose, revise source libraries, install a new baseline, and retest the same questions in a fresh answer-isolated context.

authoritative_training_loop.name: FIRST_PREDICTION_FREEZE
authoritative_training_loop.rule: Freeze the original question, chart inputs, source baseline version, TOP1, TOP2, confidence, evidence ledger and pairwise matrix before answer reveal.

authoritative_training_loop.name: ANSWER_REVEAL_AND_LITERAL_REPLAY
authoritative_training_loop.rule: Reveal only after freeze, replay the answer vector literally, and compare it mechanically with the frozen prediction.

authoritative_training_loop.name: POSTREVEAL_KNOWLEDGE_DIGESTION
authoritative_training_loop.rule: Diagnose why the reasoning failed, read the actual source parent clauses, and classify each defect as existing-knowledge-not-used, source-knowledge-gap, routing-gap, semantic-gap, temporal-gap, endpoint-gap, track-independence-gap or adjudication-gap.

authoritative_training_loop.name: SOURCE_PATCH_CANDIDATE_BUILD
authoritative_training_loop.rule: Create a candidate patch assigned to the responsible S00-S19 libraries. Every added or changed rule must contain provenance, parent text, applicability conditions, limitations, counterexamples, capability ceiling and a no-case-specific-content scan.

authoritative_training_loop.name: CANDIDATE_BASELINE_MATERIALIZATION
authoritative_training_loop.rule: Materialize a complete candidate S00-S19 baseline, compute full-file hashes and sizes, rebuild the S00 index and S19 active binding table, and produce an installation receipt. The prior baseline remains immutable.

authoritative_training_loop.name: FRESH_CONTEXT_SAME_SET_RETEST
authoritative_training_loop.rule: Run the same 25 questions in a fresh answer-isolated context that can read only the original questions, charts, candidate S00-S19 baseline, runtime code and permitted reality facts. It must not read answers, prior predictions, post-reveal ranks, diagnoses or the source patch rationale.

authoritative_training_loop.name: PREDICTION_FREEZE_THEN_SCORE
authoritative_training_loop.rule: Freeze all 25 new predictions before answer reveal, then score TOP1 and TOP2. If below target, return to step 3 using the new frozen misses.

authoritative_training_loop.name: SAME_SET_TARGET_AND_LATER_GENERALIZATION
authoritative_training_loop.rule: Same-set clean retest validates whether the revised knowledge system was reproducibly absorbed. Only after same-set target is met may new unseen cases be used to test generalization.

patch_classification_gate.EXISTING_KNOWLEDGE_NOT_USED: Do not duplicate base knowledge. Repair indexing, routing, object materialization, propagation or validation.
patch_classification_gate.SOURCE_KNOWLEDGE_GAP: Add a source-backed general rule only with provenance and user approval required by the active policy.
patch_classification_gate.UNSUPPORTED_HYPOTHESIS: Keep in research ledger; do not activate.

learning_semantics.knowledge_absorption_meaning: The learned material becomes auditable source text, routing, endpoint, adjudication and validation objects that future clean contexts can actually use.
